visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of the black safety netting of a large trampoline in what appears to be a warehouse-style retail environment. A yellow ball rests on the black jumping surface inside. The Costco logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The camera pans upwards and sideways, revealing a basketball hoop attached to the interior frame of the trampoline. Price tags and product information cards are visible in the background, suspended from the ceiling. (3) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light-colored blouse and a black vest, enters the frame. She looks at the trampoline with a look of awe and gestures toward it with her hands while smiling. (4) The camera focuses on a close-up of the heavy-duty white zipper on the trampoline's safety net, with a hand briefly touching it to demonstrate its quality. (5) The scene shifts to the woman standing in a store aisle, surrounded by shelves stocked with various products. She talks directly to the camera with high facial expressiveness, including wide smiles and squinted eyes, conveying excitement and humor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 巨大彈簧床. (2) [Subtitle]: 如果這個開放試用的話. (3) [Subtitle]: 全部的小朋友應該都會在裡面. [Variety]: 99. (4) [Slogan]: 34999元. [Subtitle]: 34999元 十尺的彈跳床. (5) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它有附籃球架 所以哇! [Variety]: 好大一個. (6) [Subtitle]: 我就是缺可以放這個的地方而已 這感覺真的超好玩的. [Variety]: 這感覺真的超好玩的. (7) [Subtitle]: 真的超級大感覺好好玩 然後這個拉鍊也做得滿好的 是這種粗款的拉鍊. [Variety]: 真的超級大感覺好好玩. (8) [Subtitle]: 你才能這樣子進去. (9) [Variety]: 我好想進去. [Subtitle]: 我好想進去 為什麼我不能進去為什麼. (10) [Subtitle]: 買啊你買了就能進去 我沒有地方放我家都不夠放.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 1 person filming (visible in reflections or briefly), 2-3 distant shoppers in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a light purple long-sleeved blouse under a sleeveless black knee-length dress/vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a Costco warehouse interior, featuring high ceilings, industrial lighting, large metal shelving units stacked with bulk products, and wide concrete aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, acoustic guitar-driven pop music. A female voice speaks with high energy and a bright tone. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with a price tag appearing visually. The speaker's pitch rises as she mentions the cost. (3) A 'pop' bubble sound effect is heard as variety text overlays the screen. The music remains consistent in tempo. (4) A comic 'boing' or bounce sound effect occurs as the speaker discusses the trampoline's features. A second female voice is briefly heard laughing in the background. (5) The primary speaker continues in a conversational, humorous tone with frequent rising intonations as she expresses her desire to enter the trampoline. Fast-paced editing cuts are mirrored by short pauses in the vocal track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique and large product (a Springfree trampoline) found at Costco, highlighting its features and price in an entertaining, personal vlog style.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of product features, brand name visibility (Springfree), and price mention within a shopping vlog context.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual and auditory 'hooks' typical of short-form social media content to maintain engagement.
